Alessandro Schopf.note: Schöpf gives Austria experienced running power, helping the midfield cover wide spaces and arrive late.
Alessandro Schopf.noteZh: 舍普夫给奥地利有经验的跑动能力，帮助中场覆盖边路空间并后插上。

Alexander Prass.note: Prass gives Austria left-sided thrust, carrying forward and supplying early service from wide areas.
Alexander Prass.noteZh: 普拉斯给奥地利左侧推进力，能向前带球并从边路早早送出传中。

Alexander Schlager.note: Schlager gives Austria an experienced goalkeeper option, steady when pressure arrives through crosses.
Alexander Schlager.noteZh: 施拉格给奥地利有经验的门将选择，当压力来自传中时很稳定。

Carney Chukwuemeka.note: Chukwuemeka adds carrying power through midfield, useful when Austria need to break pressure by dribbling.
Carney Chukwuemeka.noteZh: 丘库埃梅卡增加中场带球力量，当奥地利需要用盘带破压时很有用。

David Affengruber.note: Affengruber gives Austria centre-back depth, especially useful for aerial spells and low-box defending.
David Affengruber.noteZh: 阿芬格鲁伯给奥地利中卫深度，尤其适合空中球阶段和低位禁区防守。

David Alaba.note: Alaba remains Austria's organiser, bringing left-footed passing and calm leadership across the back line.
David Alaba.noteZh: 阿拉巴仍是奥地利组织者，给后防带来左脚传球和冷静领导力。

Dejan Ljubicic.note: Ljubičić gives Austria flexible midfield legs, useful for pressing and covering the right channel.
Dejan Ljubicic.noteZh: 柳比契奇给奥地利灵活的中场跑动，适合压迫并覆盖右侧通道。

Florian Grillitsch.note: Grillitsch gives Austria a deeper passing base, slowing the game down and protecting the center.
Florian Grillitsch.noteZh: 格里利奇给奥地利更靠后的传球基础，能放慢比赛并保护中路。

Florian Wiegele.note: Wiegele gives Austria extra goalkeeper depth, useful insurance behind the senior options.
Florian Wiegele.noteZh: 维格勒给奥地利额外门将深度，是主力门将身后的有用保障。

Kevin Danso.note: Danso gives Austria pace and strength at centre-back, important when the line has to defend space.
Kevin Danso.noteZh: 丹索给奥地利中卫位置的速度和力量，当防线需要防守空间时很重要。

Konrad Laimer.note: Laimer is Austria's pressing engine, turning loose touches into forward momentum.
Konrad Laimer.noteZh: 莱默是奥地利压迫发动机，能把对手松散触球变成向前势头。

Marcel Sabitzer.note: Sabitzer gives Austria midfield punch, especially through set pieces, late runs, and shots from range.
Marcel Sabitzer.noteZh: 萨比策给奥地利中场冲击，尤其体现在定位球、后插上和远射。

Marco Friedl.note: Friedl gives Austria left-sided defensive cover, helping the back line stay balanced in buildup.
Marco Friedl.noteZh: 弗里德尔给奥地利左侧防守保护，帮助后防在组织时保持平衡。

Marko Arnautovic.note: Arnautović gives Austria a veteran focal point, able to pin defenders and finish direct service.
Marko Arnautovic.noteZh: 阿瑙托维奇给奥地利老练支点，能牵制后卫并终结直接输送。

Michael Gregoritsch.note: Gregoritsch gives Austria a taller forward route, dangerous when crosses and second balls matter.
Michael Gregoritsch.noteZh: 格雷戈里奇给奥地利更高的锋线路线，当传中和第二落点重要时很危险。

Michael Svoboda.note: Svoboda gives Austria a straightforward defensive option, useful for protecting leads and clearing pressure.
Michael Svoboda.noteZh: 斯沃博达给奥地利直接的防守选择，适合保护领先并化解压力。

Nicolas Seiwald.note: Seiwald gives Austria midfield structure, keeping the press connected and the ball moving.
Nicolas Seiwald.noteZh: 塞瓦尔德给奥地利中场结构，能保持压迫衔接并让球运转。

Patrick Pentz.note: Pentz gives Austria sharp shot-stopping and quick restarts when the team wants to spring forward.
Patrick Pentz.noteZh: 彭茨给奥地利敏捷扑救和快速开球，当球队想迅速向前时很有用。

Patrick Wimmer.note: Wimmer gives Austria a direct wide runner, useful for pressing full-backs and driving to the byline.
Patrick Wimmer.noteZh: 维默给奥地利直接边路跑动，适合压迫边后卫并冲到底线。

Paul Wanner.note: Wanner adds young creativity between the lines, giving Austria a softer touch against compact blocks.
Paul Wanner.noteZh: 万纳增加两线之间的年轻创造力，让奥地利面对密集防守时多一份细腻触球。

Philipp Lienhart.note: Lienhart gives Austria reliable centre-back timing, steady in aerial duels and first passes.
Philipp Lienhart.noteZh: 林哈特给奥地利可靠的中卫时机，空中对抗和第一脚传球都很稳定。

Phillip Mwene.note: Mwene gives Austria full-back flexibility, switching sides and keeping the outside lanes secure.
Phillip Mwene.noteZh: 姆韦内给奥地利边后卫灵活性，能换边并保证外侧通道安全。

Romano Schmid.note: Schmid gives Austria short-touch creativity, useful when combinations have to open a narrow block.
Romano Schmid.noteZh: 施密德给奥地利短传创造力，当配合需要打开狭窄防线时很有用。

Sasa Kalajdzic.note: Kalajdžić gives Austria a true aerial target, changing the attack when direct balls become necessary.
Sasa Kalajdzic.noteZh: 卡拉季奇给奥地利真正的空中支点，当必须打直接球时能改变进攻形态。

Stefan Posch.note: Posch gives Austria defensive versatility on the right, able to tuck inside and protect the box.
Stefan Posch.noteZh: 波施给奥地利右侧防守多面性，能内收并保护禁区。

Xaver Schlager.note: Schlager gives Austria midfield bite, hunting second balls and keeping pressure on the opponent's first pass.
Xaver Schlager.noteZh: 施拉格给奥地利中场硬度，争抢第二落点并持续压迫对手第一脚传球。
